title: Moving to a new flat
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: My older brother moved into a new flat last month. He had lived with our parents (27) he finished university, so this was the first time he had had his own place. The flat is small, but it is not far (28) his office and has a balcony with a nice view. On moving day, I helped him carry boxes upstairs because the lift was not working. Some boxes were heavier (29) they looked, and we had to stop several times. After we had finished, we went out to buy a few things for the kitchen. My brother said he was excited about living alone, although he was also a little worried (30) paying all the bills himself. Mum gave him some advice (31) cooking cheap meals and saving money. I think he will soon get used (32) his new life.

questions.explanation: Until means up to the time when something changed.
